<?php /** * This file is part of the Carbon package. * * (c) Brian Nesbitt <brian@nesbot.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ return array_replace_recursive(require __DIR__.'/ms.php', [ 'formats' => [ 'LT' => 'h:mm a', 'LTS' => 'h:mm:ss a', 'L' => 'D/MM/yy', 'LL' => 'D MMM YYYY', 'LLL' => 'D MMMM YYYY, h:mm a', 'LLLL' => 'dd MMMM YYYY, h:mm a', ], 'meridiem' => ['a', 'p'], ]);
